retrieved_result: Using BRAVIA Sync with  Control for HDMI Using BRAVIA Sync with Control for HDMIThe BRAVIA Sync function on this TV communicates with other Sony equipment supporting the Control for HDMI function. To connect Sony equipment with Control for HDMIUse an HDMI cable that bears the HDMI logo for connection. See the HDMI connection shown in the Q
